title: Fun Birthday Cards for Granny - Wonderful Female - Cute Happy Birthday Card for Granny from Grandson Granddaughter, Special Gifts, 145mm Floral Greeting Cards
features: MAKE GRANNY SMILE WITH THIS HEARTFELT HAPPY BIRTHDAY CARD GRANNY: This exceptional quality birthday card for her shows the design "To My Wonderful Granny Happy Birthday". If you are looking for beautiful birthday greetings cards for her, then this happy mothers day card is bound to make them laugh. Not just for mothers day gifts for Granny this could also be a birthday card for Granny, Grandma, Gran or Grandmother.

WHAT DO YOU GET: The card is printed on one side and BLANK ON THE INSIDE to allow you to write your very own message. The unique fun design is printed on a specially sourced and environmentally responsible board. At 360 microns thick the natural white one-sided gloss board has a quality look and feel. Supplied with a coloured gummed envelope to complement the design and ready to be sealed and sent in the post.

NO INK SMUDGES: There is nothing worse than writing inside a card to find that the shiny surface makes the ink smudge. This is why we use a high quality one sided coated board. The uncoated side will absorb more of the ink from your pen to make smudging a thing of the past. Happy birthday Granny cards, Granny birthday card, Gran birthday cards.

SIZES: Greeting Card = 145mm x 145mm, Envelope = 155mm x 155mm, Card Thickness = 360 micron. Great Granny birthday cards from Granddaughter or Grandson. Granny birthday cards from Grandchildren, birthday cards for Granny, birthday card Gran, Grandmother birthday card, Granny birthday cards from Grandson, Granny cards birthday, special Granny birthday cards, Granny 70th birthday card, birthday card Granny from Granddaughter.

MADE AND QUALITY CHECKED IN THE UK: We print and manufacture all our product right her in the UK so you can be sure of a fast turnaround and a product that is expertly made. Using environmentally responsible premium board our card is conscious of the responsible management of the world's forests - birthday cards Granny, birthday card Grandmother, Step Granny birthday card, Grannys birthday card.
description: Product Description Celebrate with Joy and Laughter Introducing our exceptional range of greeting cards for birthdays that are guaranteed to bring joy and laughter to any celebration! We understand the importance of finding the perfect card that captures the spirit of the occasion. Our birthday card collection offers a delightful array of hilarious, fun, cheeky, and party-ready cards designed to make you smile from ear to ear. Whether it's a milestone birthday or any age in between, our birthday cards bring a touch of humor and warmth to their special day. Delivering 4 Every Occasion Since 2014 Based in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, our journey began in 2014 as a small printing company specialising in personalised printing on mugs, garments and cases for phones. Designing and printing have always been at the core of our passion so within a few years, we expanded our product range to include printed greeting cards. From birthdays and anniversaries to weddings and engagements, our beautifully crafted cards will help you express your emotions with elegance and flair. Join us on this creative journey as we continue to explore new avenues in design and printing excellence, always striving to exceed your expectations. Celebrate Every Occasion Celebrate special moments with our versatile greeting cards selection! Birthdays, anniversaries, engagements, weddings, housewarming, new job, new baby, retirement and more - our unique designs have you covered. Spread joy, love and laughter with our wide range of occasion-specific cards. Perfect for every celebration! Sustainability In Mind Our greeting card products are printed responsibly using uncoated premium card. With a commitment to sustainability, our fully recyclable cards and envelopes ensure minimal environmental impact. Celebrate special moments with peace of mind, knowing that our materials are chosen with care for a greener future. Crafted In The UK Meticulously designed and printed in the UK by a small business driven by care and pride. We pour our heart into every design, ensuring that our high-quality products bring joy and touch hearts. Celebrate special moments knowing that each card is made with love and a commitment to excellence.
